sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 273 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 385/2023 2. For orders on office objection No.1 & 26 3. For orders on CMA No.386/2023 4. For hearing of main case 30.01.2026 Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel this matter is time-barred as denoted vide order dated 16.01.2026. He further states that question before the court has already been decided against the applicant by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Millat Tractors reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, learned counsel states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
